The '''''Garman''-class Gas Miner''' was an [[Gas|atmospheric]] [[mining]] craft used extensively by [[Lant Mining Corporation]].<ref name="FBS" />

More transport vessel than actual mining ship, the Garman acted as a close-orbit storage and support station for its complement of twenty [[Gas Skimmer GS-III]]s. Releasing the skimmers in the upper orbit of [[gas giant]]s, the Garman stored the gasses collected by skimmers in its vast pressurized holds; once its holds were completely filled, the Garman would recall its skimmers and jump to one of the [[Lant Mining Corporation]]s refineries to deposit its cargo and begin the process all over again.<ref name="FBS" />
